title: CONSUMER FINANCIAL SERVICES INFORMATION - 211info
text: DIVISION OF FINANCIAL REGULATION CONSUMER FINANCIAL SERVICES INFORMATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Consumer advocates provide information on a variety of consumer financial services issues, including: -Managing finances: Tips for managing finances, getting out of debt, and learning about state-chartered banks and credit unions -Protecting finances: Tips for avoiding investment fraud, protecting one's identity, and getting help with collections or repossessions -Loans and debt help: Information about personal loans, building credit, and resources for preventing or managing a foreclosure -Securities and investments: Information about investing and help choosing a financial professional -Student loan servicing: Student loan ombudsman receives, reviews, and attempts to resolve complaints from student loan borrowers, provides borrowers information about rights and responsibilities, and directs them to resources 350 Winter Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email - (888) 877-4894 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Toll-free (888) 877-4894 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Financial Literacy Training Mortgage Delinquency and Default Counseling Student Financial Aid Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER ASSISTANCE AND PROTECTION - FINANCE, INSURANCE, AND STUDENT LOAN COMPLAINTS MONEY MANAGEMENT - BANK ON OREGON If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. DIVISION OF FINANCIAL REGULATION
